creator: gahr@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

http://lists.freebsd.org/pipermail/freebsd-ports/2012-October/078676.html 
refers to the new OPTIONS framework, not to Makefile headers. I will 
update the Makefile header as part of the next functional update, I'm 
not about to commit only for that. Thanks.
